labels.analysis: The MCP Server "MCP-native URL security scanner that protects AI agent workflows." provides 2 tools focused on security & authentication tasks. Core capabilities include analysis and computation. Key tools: url_scanner_scan, url_scanner_scan_with_intent.
labels.reasoning: Primary label "Security & Authentication" assigned based on strong keyword matches in tool names and descriptions: security, scan_, threat, phishing, malware.
labels.custom_label: Security & Authentication - MCP-native URL security scanner that protects AI agent workflows.

metadata.server_name: MCP-native URL security scanner that protects AI agent workflows.

tools.name: url_scanner_scan
tools.description: Analyze a URL for security threats including phishing, malware, and suspicious patterns. Returns risk score, confidence, agent access guidance, and intent_alignment (always not_provided for this tool; use url_scanner_scan_with_intent for intent context).

inputSchema.description:
Request parameters for url_scanner_scan tool.

The URL parameter accepts both encoded and unencoded URLs.
If no scheme is provided, https:// is assumed.

url.description: The URL to analyze. Must be HTTP or HTTPS. If no scheme provided, https:// is assumed.

inputSchema.title: ScanRequest

tools.name: url_scanner_scan_with_intent
tools.description: Analyze a URL for security threats with optional user intent context. Returns risk score, confidence, agent access guidance, and intent_alignment.

inputSchema.description:
Request parameters for url_scanner_scan_with_intent tool.

The URL parameter accepts both encoded and unencoded URLs.
If no scheme is provided, https:// is assumed.

intent.description: Optional user intent for visiting the URL. Recommended for additional context.

url.description: The URL to analyze. Must be HTTP or HTTPS. If no scheme provided, https:// is assumed.

inputSchema.title: ScanWithIntentRequest
